ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the clothing size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "cm_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement in centimeters */,
  "fr_es_measurement" INTEGER /* Measurement in French/Spanish sizing */,
  "it_measurement" INTEGER /* Measurement in Italian sizing */,
  "uk_us_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement in UK/US sizing */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., Women, Men, Kids) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand linked to the brands table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size linked to the sizes table */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the stock is held */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level for the specific size at the location */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand linked to the brands table */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for when to reorder stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "last_checked_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last physically checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the store location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country in which the store is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries regarding inventory */,
  "address" TEXT /* Complete address of the store location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager linked to the users table */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Store opening hours */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the inventory management system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size linked to the sizes table */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the size was sold */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of units sold for the specific size */,
  "return_count" INTEGER /* Number of units returned for the specific size */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand linked to the brands table */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range for the performance metrics */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the size */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_performance_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_performance_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
